case_title: COLLINS, DR. DANIEL A. et al vs. WESTSIDE COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH CENTER et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTSIDE COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH CENTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2330 POST ST, SF, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLEASE SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
